finance.market_status: Open (April 2nd trading session in early stages)
key_events: AMZN is committing to a $200 billion capital expenditure plan for 2026, focused heavily on AWS infrastructure and AI supercomputing capabilities.
INTC finalized a strategic $5 billion equity investment from NVIDIA, aimed at integrating NVLink technology with x86 architecture; 18A process node shipments are actively underway.
March exports surged 48.3% to a record $86 billion; semiconductor shipments exceeded $30 billion.
OECD lowered 2026 South Korea growth forecast to 1.7% from 2.1%.
Goldman Sachs raised KOSPI year-end target to 7,000 from 6,400.

upcoming_events.description: BEXCO Exhibition Center 1, Busan. 136 galleries showcasing approximately 4,000 artworks.
COEX Hall C&D, Seoul. A major fixture in the Korean art fair calendar.

upcoming_events.event: APMA, Chapter Five – From the APMA Collection
upcoming_events.description: Amorepacific Museum of Art exhibition featuring works by David Hockney, Rose Wylie, Nam June Paik, and Lee Ufan.

art.policy: April is officially recognized as 'Science Month' in South Korea.
